title: Dryas octopetala genuina
intro: Dryas octopetala genuina, also known as Mountain Avens, is a perennial plant species native to the Arctic tundra. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for wound healing and immune system support. The bioactive constituents of Mountain Avens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Mountain Avens include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
